title: Calyptra Preferences Schema
description: DataStore preferences - 'settings' store. Extension property Context.dataStore.
construction: PreferencesRepository(context: Context) — uses Context.dataStore extension property

protection_enabled.description: Whether VPN protection is currently requested. Read by AdBlockVpnService at startup; service stops itself if false. Written by MainViewModel.setProtectionEnabled().

last_blocklist_update.description: Epoch milliseconds of last successful remote blocklist update. Displayed as 'Last Updated' on MainScreen. Written atomically with blocklist_version via updateBlocklistMetadata().

blocklist_version.description: Identifier for current blocklist source. 'bundled' = default only, 'remote-update' = includes downloaded Hagezi Light update. Written atomically with last_blocklist_update.

game_ads_allowed.description: Whether game ad SDK domains (Unity Ads, AppLovin, Vungle, ironSource, Chartboost, Meta AN) are exempted from blocking. Allows rewarded video in free games. Collected reactively by AdBlockVpnService → BlocklistManager.allowGameAds (@Volatile). Takes effect immediately without VPN restart.

safe_search_enabled.description: Whether DNS-level SafeSearch is enforced for Google (~139 TLDs), Bing, and DuckDuckGo. Redirects domains to forced-safe endpoints. Collected reactively by AdBlockVpnService → SafeSearchManager.safeSearchEnabled (@Volatile).

youtube_restrict_level.description: YouTube Restricted Mode level: 'off' (no redirect), 'moderate' (restrictmoderate.youtube.com), or 'strict' (restrict.youtube.com). Covers youtube.com, www/m.youtube.com, youtubei.googleapis.com, youtube.googleapis.com, youtube-nocookie.com, music.youtube.com. Collected reactively by AdBlockVpnService → SafeSearchManager.youtubeRestrictLevel (@Volatile).

pin_hash.description: Base64 PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256 hash (100k iterations) of the 4-digit parent PIN. Empty string means no PIN set. Written via PinStore interface implemented by PreferencesRepository (PIN-L1).

pin_salt.description: Base64 16-byte SecureRandom salt for the PIN hash. Rotated on every setPin (PIN-L1).

pin_failed_attempts.description: Consecutive failed PIN attempts. Reset to 0 on successful verify or setPin. Feeds LockoutPolicy (PIN-L4).

pin_lockout_until.description: Epoch millis until which PIN entry is locked out (30s doubling per failure from the 5th, capped 300s). Persisted so process death does not bypass lockout (PIN-L4).

battery_prompt_shown.description: Whether the one-time battery-optimization exemption explainer was shown after first enable (PWR-L3, FR-9.4).

blocked_categories.description: Enabled social-media block categories by SocialCategory.key (tiktok, instagram, snapchat, facebook, twitter, reddit, discord, twitch). Collected reactively by AdBlockVpnService -> CategoryBlockManager. Category hits answer NXDOMAIN (SOC-L2/L3). Default empty = nothing blocked.

write_methods.updateBlocklistMetadata(timestamp: Long,: atomic edit — writes both last_blocklist_update and blocklist_version in single transaction
